title.v: thông tin thuế TNCN cho nhân viên

footer.v: 1 - Từ 3 tháng trở lên, 0 - Nhỏ hơn 3 tháng
footer.e: 1 - At least three months, 0 - Less than three months

command.text:
declare @extTable varchar(32), @lTaxCode int, @s varchar(128) select @extTable = 'hrtttncn' select @lTaxCode = prec from syscolumns where name = 'ma_so_thue' and id = object_id(@extTable)
select 'set$ExternalMaxLengthFields(this, ''' + rtrim(@lTaxCode) + ''');' as message return

declare @cookie varchar(32), @ten_tinh nvarchar(128), @ten_tinh2 nvarchar(128), @ten_bac_ql nvarchar(128), @ten_bac_ql2 nvarchar(128), @ma_so_thue nvarchar(32), @doi_tuong char(1), @tinh_thue_yn char(1), @tinh_gt_yn char(1), @hop_dong_yn char(1), @uy_quyen_yn char(1)
select @cookie = convert(varchar(19), a.datetime2, 121), @ten_tinh = b.ten_tinh, @ten_tinh2 = b.ten_tinh2, @ten_bac_ql = c.ten_bac, @ten_bac_ql2 = c.ten_bac2 from hrnv a left join hrdmtinh b on a.cmnd_noi_cap = b.ma_tinh left join hrdmbql c on a.bac_quan_ly = c.ma_bac where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec
if exists(select 1 from hrtttncn where stt_rec = @stt_rec) select @ma_so_thue = ma_so_thue, @doi_tuong = doi_tuong, @tinh_thue_yn = tinh_thue_yn, @tinh_gt_yn = tinh_gt_yn, @hop_dong_yn = hop_dong_yn, @uy_quyen_yn = uy_quyen_yn from hrtttncn where stt_rec = @stt_rec else begin insert into hrtttncn (stt_rec, ma_so_thue, ngay_cap_mst, noi_cap_mst, doi_tuong, tinh_thue_yn, tinh_gt_yn, hop_dong_yn, uy_quyen_yn, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2) select @stt_rec, '', '', '', '1', '1', '1', '1', '1', getdate(), getdate(), 0, 0 select @ma_so_thue = '', @doi_tuong = '1', @tinh_thue_yn = '1', @tinh_gt_yn = '1', @hop_dong_yn = '1', @uy_quyen_yn = '1' end
select @ten_tinh as ten_tinh, @ten_tinh2 as ten_tinh2, @ten_bac_ql as ten_bac_ql, @ten_bac_ql2 as ten_bac_ql2, @ma_so_thue as ma_so_thue, @doi_tuong as doi_tuong, @tinh_thue_yn as tinh_thue_yn, @tinh_gt_yn as tinh_gt_yn, @hop_dong_yn as hop_dong_yn, @uy_quyen_yn as uy_quyen_yn, @cookie as cookie
return

&CommandCheckTaxCodeBeforeSave;
if exists (select 1 from hrtttncn where stt_rec = @stt_rec) begin update hrtttncn set ma_so_thue = @$ma_so_thue, doi_tuong = @$doi_tuong, tinh_thue_yn = @$tinh_thue_yn, tinh_gt_yn = @$tinh_gt_yn, hop_dong_yn = @$hop_dong_yn, uy_quyen_yn = @$uy_quyen_yn, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec end else begin insert into hrtttncn (stt_rec, ma_so_thue, ngay_cap_mst, noi_cap_mst, doi_tuong, tinh_thue_yn, tinh_gt_yn, hop_dong_yn, uy_quyen_yn, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2) select @stt_rec, @$ma_so_thue, null, '', @$doi_tuong, @$tinh_thue_yn, @$tinh_gt_yn, @$hop_dong_yn, @$uy_quyen_yn, getdate(), getdate(), @@userID, @@userID end if $hrtttncnct.NewValue <> $hrtttncnct.OldValue begin update @hrtttncnct set stt_rec = @stt_rec delete hrtttncnct where stt_rec = @stt_rec insert into hrtttncnct select * from @hrtttncnct end if $hrttctpt.NewValue <> $hrttctpt.OldValue begin update @hrttctpt set stt_rec = @stt_rec delete hrttctpt where stt_rec = @stt_rec insert into hrttctpt select * from @hrttctpt update hrttctpt set ten_pt2 = ten_pt where stt_rec = @stt_rec end /*
